summary: Full frontend testing of Wholesale Offer Calculator. All calculations verified, modals work, deal score logic correct, mobile responsive.

issues: On mobile, results panel appears below inputs (stacked layout) - this is expected responsive behavior, works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In the 'Average deal' test case (ARV=200000, RC=40000, AF=5000), the score correctly shows 'Excellent Deal' because investorProfitPct=32.5%>=25% AND repairCostPct=20%<=25% - logic is correct
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend calculator app. All features tested and working: calculations (ARV=300000/RC=30000/AF=10000 → MAO=$170K, FirstOffer=$153K, BuyerPrice=$180K, InvestorProfit=$100K), deal score (Excellent/green at 33.3%), advanced options toggle+slider, reset, save/delete deals via localStorage, modals. PDF export and clipboard copy buttons exist but not testable via Playwright (file download + clipboard API).
